Article 4 of Law No. 12 of 2004, which was superseded, deals with the duties and powers of the Chief Justice of the Courts, including general supervision and specific powers and duties (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:1:2:f2ce4b20).

answer_text: Article 6(3) of the Data Protection Law 2020, as amended by Law No. 1 of 2025, clarifies that the law applies to Processing of Personal Data in the DIFC by a Controller or Processor (or their Sub-processors), regardless of place of incorporation, as part of stable arrangements and not on an occasional basis, and specifies that Processing “in the DIFC” occurs when the means or personnel used are physically located in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31). This modifies the original scope by emphasizing stable arrangements and clarifying the physical presence requirement for Processing in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31).

These laws are expressly cited as conferring the necessary powers for these regulations (cite: 20be16a68c4d24768f569bcde5ddb29437204006c0c4262296c350b365672cd1:2:0:62069597).

1. in the form now attached the DIFC Laws Amendment Law 2018: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: fe81efddb24f01f4455fc6b16fc0867615e840b0d36e7abfd1441e5c2eaed92d:1:anchor:1e2b6cab)
2. in the form now attached the DIFC Law Amendment Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 0ee112f26f9b33c272a4fad301c52e7309c98236d627ad2451202ca6f5f0cdc7:1:anchor:a2c4707b, 31af73c34191903fc3fab3233322ab3e97edb1820a966af313200cdb9bd3b24e:1:anchor:83d55e0e, fb4addc95a4cf4e622a048ba729de434400e523f293197cb979514485c067b1b:1:anchor:d121ee6b)
3. DIFC Laws Amendment Law, DIFC Law No.1 of 2025: Comes into force on the date specified in the Enactment Notice in respect of this Law (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:anchor:6155eed2)
4. in the form now attached the Digital Assets Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: c850b3f04668abe265441e338a92d3ec1c547948b895cf1c27e4a7f2506bb130:1:anchor:2bc8e8a7, 849bf95cdc57e206fdab9597da97c15e608252902252e4ac6ac3c7cb1db89aa8:1:anchor:72624cd8)

1. in the form now attached the DIFC Laws Amendment Law 2018: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: fe81efddb24f01f4455fc6b16fc0867615e840b0d36e7abfd1441e5c2eaed92d:1:anchor:1e2b6cab)
2. in the form now attached the DIFC Law Amendment Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 31af73c34191903fc3fab3233322ab3e97edb1820a966af313200cdb9bd3b24e:1:anchor:83d55e0e, 0ee112f26f9b33c272a4fad301c52e7309c98236d627ad2451202ca6f5f0cdc7:1:anchor:a2c4707b, fb4addc95a4cf4e622a048ba729de434400e523f293197cb979514485c067b1b:0:0:7a786bb5)
3. DIFC Laws Amendment Law, DIFC Law No.1 of 2025: Comes into force on the date specified in the Enactment Notice in respect of this Law (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:anchor:6155eed2)
4. in the form now attached the Employment Law Amendment Law 2021: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: f4616ad41ec3ba5b428b3e40c2ede7b5f37f2fe26d30d6fc152db8924bfda10c:1:anchor:45457e16, bac066005f21591dbcff19a56cdef279bd4f32482e3758925a38c478e75b81a8:1:anchor:43ca6353)
5. in the form now attached the Law of Security Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 77ed6765ad5556f347f1e9fdfb0ce72dba0451713359f73aae3fbc00b35ede32:0:0:da4023eb)
6. in the form now attached the Employment Law 2019: Shall come into force on 90 days after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 96853cbb2873718b7613b42de18dcf417aac607e7fd3e143cab9db7f40622263:1:anchor:b60024d9)
